human_task_name: SynAIpse CC1: adversarial review of recommendation effects
objective: Find a concrete production or compatibility defect in the final CC1 recommendation-effects implementation and its preserved QA evidence, or record a fresh packet-bound no-finding review.

decision_frame.value: Challenge the CC1 boundary after Worker evidence and a governed deterministic QA fallback, before CC2 may be admitted.
decision_frame.why_now: Source and QA-control evidence are preserved in immutable target f2de738ff0cef0c036b2f48ab3ba06f3a5157208; the remaining ordered review stage is adversarial scrutiny.
acceptance_criteria: Review distinguishes current `harness next` invocation effects from later recommendation effects.
Review looks for legacy producer compatibility, malformed-envelope bypasses, mutable-array aliasing, and incorrect authority propagation.
Result binds the reviewed immutable SHA and records either assertion-shaped findings or an explicit no-finding verdict.
decision_frame.risk_or_learning_target: A versioned additive projection can appear internally valid while silently changing old producer or consumer semantics.
decision_frame.smallest_increment: One independent adversarial review artifact and packet-bound result.

non_goals: Do not edit source, tests, prior review artifacts, the commit, branch, or worktree.
Do not invoke recommended side-effecting commands, use network, or mutate hosted state.
Do not push, merge, rebase, reset, stash, clean, or delete anything.

validation_entrypoints: pnpm exec vitest run src/commands/next-fitness-report.test.ts src/commands/next-agent-parity.test.ts src/commands/next-decision-meta.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts src/lib/decision/harness-decision.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/state.test.ts --reporter=dot

delegated_decision_rights: Read and test the immutable target only.
Write the declared adversarial artifact/result or report a packet-bound blocker.
